info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Creation API facilitates the onboarding of new users by streamlining the account registration process. This endpoint allows businesses to efficiently add users to their system, ensuring a seamless experience for new clients or team members. Typical consumers include application developers and system administrators looking to implement user management functionalities. By utilizing this API, organizations can enhance user engagement and simplify account management workflows.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new account by providing the necessary information. Ensure that all required fields are completed to successfully create the account.

requestBody.description: This request body expects a JSON payload containing the necessary information to create a new account. Ensure that all required fields are populated according to the specified schema.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

200.description: Request completed successfully and account data returned.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Account Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates the success status of the operation.

message.description: A descriptive message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The API endpoint path that caused the error.

trace.description: A stack trace or diagnostic information related to the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error, if applicable.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema defines the structure of a 500 error response returned during account operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database timeout occurred while saving account information.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The identifier of the customer related to the error.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the type of error.

message.description: A message providing more context about the error.
message.example: No account matches the provided identifier.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch related to the error, if applicable.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: This schema defines additional details related to an error response.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Operations Error Response

timestamp.description: The time at which the error occurred.

status.description: The success status of the operation, which will be false on error.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Customer profile not found for account creation.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A stack trace providing more details about the error, if available.

details.description: Additional details about the error, specific to the operation.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema defines the structure of the error response returned when an account operation fails with a 404 status.

example.message: Customer profile not found for account creation.

details.message: No registered banking customer exists with the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

accountType.description: The type of account to be created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: The currency in which the account is maintained.

initialDeposit.description: The initial deposit amount to fund the account.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch where the account will be opened.

customerCategory.description: The category of the customer (e.g., individual, business).

accountFeatures.description: The features associated with the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the request body required for creating a new account in the system.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-AccountFe.title: Account Features

onlineBanking.description: Indicates whether online banking is available for the account.

mobileBanking.description: Indicates whether mobile banking is available for the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-AccountFe.description: This schema defines the features available for an account.

accountId.description: The unique identifier for the account.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: The type of the account (e.g., Savings, Checking).

currency.description: The currency in which the account is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR).

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive).

branchCode.description: The code of the branch where the account is held.

createdDate.description: The date when the account was created.

message.description: A message related to the account operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Response schema for successful account creation operation.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
